Damage assessment team confirmed an EF-1 tornado briefly touched down near Four Mile Rd. with winds estimated up to 100 mph. The tornado was on the ground for 0.92 miles with an estimated 400 yard wide path of damage. Approximately 300 trees were uprooted and snapped with one home sustaining a broken window.
No injuries or fatalities. Minor damage to one home and approx. 20 acres of trees downed/damaged.
